title: POV: A Tiny Dream Gets a Guardian
description: A cinematic CERBERRA fantasy short: a tiny violet dream gets protected by a silver guardian in the cloud factory. Original visuals and audio. First upload recommended as Private for review.
review_required: Watch full video on mobile before publishing.
If primarily child-directed, set Made for Kids correctly before public release.
Do not add comment bait or sales links if Made for Kids.
Confirm original audio and visuals are acceptable.
note: The binary MP4 package was generated in the ChatGPT sandbox and provided to the operator for manual upload. This manifest records the V2 library metadata in GitHub.
